title: “This is so stupid”: Candace Owens challenges Blake Neff over Charlie Kirk and Erika Kirk TPUSA successor claims
summary_full: Candace Owens and Blake Neff clashed again on X after Neff appeared to mock Owens’ possible presidential ambitions. Owens responded by demanding proof that Charlie Kirk appointed Erika Kirk as his successor at TPUSA. Their argument quickly spread online, with supporters from both sides reacting strongly. The controversy also renewed public debate around Erika Kirk’s growing role within Turning Point USA.
